subtitle: I'm a results-driven Full Stack Developer building high-performance web applications and scalable backend services with React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL. I optimize system performance, automate CI/CD, and ship features that drive user engagement and business outcomes.

experience.title: WEVO Conversion
description: Developed and maintained a high-traffic customer web platform using React, Next.js and TypeScript, implementing SSR and code-splitting to improve load performance and reduce bundle size.
Built and optimized Node.js APIs and Postgres/Supabase queries with caching and query tuning, cutting average API response time by 40% and increasing throughput by 35%.
Led CI/CD implementation with GitHub Actions and containerized pipelines, reducing deployment time to under 15 minutes with automated rollback.
Established test suites and code-review standards and mentored 3-4 junior developers, helping reduce production bugs by ~30%.
Delivered 8+ major features through close collaboration with product and design, driving a 22% increase in user engagement.

experience.title: Xentra Solutions
description: Built responsive front-end experiences using React and modern JavaScript and delivered WordPress projects, improving page load performance by ~25% and enhancing mobile UX.
Integrated RESTful APIs and third-party services with client-side caching and efficient Supabase queries to speed up data retrieval and reduce server load.
Migrated legacy pages to a modern stack with accessibility and SEO best practices, contributing to an ~18% increase in organic traffic.
Shipped 10+ features with designers and PMs, maintained documentation, conducted code reviews, and mentored juniors and interns.

experience.title: Intelliquick
description: Converted UI/UX mockups into React screens and reusable components with Bootstrap and Tailwind CSS.
Built simple frontend and backend features with React and Node.js and migrated a backend from MySQL to MongoDB to improve scalability.
Created reusable frontend components and backend modules for internal enterprise tools and worked with cloud-hosted databases for reliability.
Participated in troubleshooting, bug fixing, and enhancement delivery for production systems across cross-functional teams.

education.title: University of the Visayas
